title: Backend Developer Vacancy at DXC Technology India Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at DXC Technology India Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Backend Developer looking for your next big career move? DXC Technology India Ventures Solutions in Ahmedabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About DXC Technology India Ventures Solutions:
DXC Technology India Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DXC Technology India Ventures Solutions!
